# MFD Partner Servicing revamp

: Naman Agarwal
Created time: October 29, 2024 11:25 AM
Status: Not started
Last edited: October 29, 2024 12:05 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

- Currently we have are missing 30% of the calls from MFD
- MFD primary complain is regarding servicing
- We can track and highlight missing SLAs
- No categorisations of the inbound issues

[Current Volt setup ](MFD%20Partner%20Servicing%20revamp/Current%20Volt%20setup%2012ee8d3af13a8039826df2f291258f48.md)

---

# **How do we measure success?**

- Reducing number of tickets per application
    - Increase applications
        - Onboard more MFDs
        - Activate more MFDs
        - Drive more engagement from MFDs
    - Decrease support Tickets
        - Reduce Issues causing the ticket
        - Provide alternate support channels like guides and FAQs
- Increasing Quality of the Ticket handling
    - Track lifecycle of the Ticket
    - Track aggregate metrics of Tickets
        - SLA
        - T50, T95
        - L1,L2,L3
    - Reduce man hours in ticket resolution

[Periskope handling ](MFD%20Partner%20Servicing%20revamp/Periskope%20handling%2012ee8d3af13a80c4b840f16b6379c572.md)
